scripts.dev: { trap 'kill 0' EXIT; vite build --watch & node --inspect=9229 --watch dist/main.js; }
scripts.pack: docker build -t ghcr.io/zirconhq/zircon:latest . && docker image save --output ./image.tar ghcr.io/zirconhq/zircon:latest
scripts.publish: docker image load --input ./image.tar && docker push ghcr.io/zirconhq/zircon:latest
